name: Uro Takako
description:
Sendai Colony – Culling Game ARC

CHARACTER:

-Uro Takako

A jujutsu sorcerer from a thousand years ago who was incarnated by Kenjaku for the Culling Game. She was originally the captain of the Sun, Moon and Stars squad, She possesses a technique that allows her to manipulate the sky
